title: Warm Crunchy Turkish Meal Bowl
description: A delicious, comforting Turkish-inspired meal bowl featuring crunchy chickpeas and a sweet glaze made with apple juice.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the apple juice, granulated sugar, lemon juice, ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chickpeas to the bowl and toss to coat with the glaze.
Spread the chickpeas out in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the chickpeas and toss to coat.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the chickpeas are crispy and caramelized.
While the chickpeas are baking, chop the fresh parsley and crispy chopped almonds.
When the chickpeas are done, remove them from the oven and let them cool slightly.
Serve the chickpeas in a bowl topped with chopped parsley and crispy almonds, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Garnish with additional chopped parsley and crispy almonds, if desired.
